response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 99
REASON: This document is almost certainly fabricated: the ADEA categorically prohibits age-based hiring screens for workers 40+, and the EEOC has never issued — and could not lawfully issue — guidance permitting "age-cohort screening" or creating a safe harbor for filtering applicants by age range, nor does any real EEOC form "EEOC-TG-2503" exist; the entire premise directly contradicts the statute the EEOC enforces.
